channel.title: Lan Pink Tattoo
channel.description: Recent content on Lan Pink Tattoo

item.title: Tattoo Price List in Ho Chi Minh City 2026
item.description:
Tattoo Price List in Ho Chi Minh City 2026

If you are looking for a clear tattoo price list in Ho Chi Minh City, especially for styles such as Mini Tattoo, Fine Line Tattoo, Blackwork, Japanese-inspired tattoos or custom designs, Lan Pink Tattoo Studio provides transparent reference pricing before you book an appointment.

At Lan Pink Tattoo, each tattoo is quoted based on size, placement, detail level and the style you want. The price list below is for reference, helping you estimate your budget before sending your design idea.

item.title: Tattoo FAQ | Frequently Asked Questions
item.description:
Does getting a tattoo hurt?

Pain level depends on placement and your personal tolerance. Bony areas like ribs, wrists, and ankles hurt more than fleshy areas like biceps or thighs. At Lan Pink Tattoo, we use high-quality needles and proper technique to minimize pain. Most clients describe it as “tolerable discomfort”.

How much does a tattoo cost in 2026?

Pricing at Lan Pink Tattoo is based on size and complexity:

item.title: Contact Lan Pink Ink
item.description:
Visit Lan Pink’s Tattoo Studio

Looking for a tattoo that tells your story? Send a message for free consultation and pricing.

Contact Information

📍 Studio Address
Near Tan Thoi Hiep Overpass, District 12, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
Open in Google Maps

🕐 Working Hours
Tuesday - Sunday: 13:00 PM - 22:00 PM (GMT+7)
Appointment only. Please book in advance

📱 Social Media

  • Instagram: @lanpink.ink — Latest artworks
  • Facebook: LanPinkInk — Quick chat

How to Book

  1. Send your idea: DM via IG/FB with reference images, placement, and size
  2. Consultation & Quote: Lan will advise on design and provide detailed pricing
  3. Confirm & Deposit: 30% deposit to secure your slot. We’ll send pre-care instructions

Note: We operate by appointment only to ensure each client gets dedicated time and attention. No walk-ins.
